payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Warm-lit table lamp with a cream-beige pleated fabric shade featuring dark vertical trim, a curving dark wood or bronze stem with a glossy white glass decorative midsection and a carved dark base; lamp appears upright on a surface and is approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"table lamp","short_description":"beige pleated shade table lamp","long_description":"Warm-lit table lamp with a cream-beige pleated fabric shade featuring dark vertical trim, a curving dark wood or bronze stem with a glossy white glass decorative midsection and a carved dark base; lamp appears upright on a surface and is approximately 0.8 m from the camera.","attributes":["beige fabric shade","dark vertical trim","pleated/paneled shade","lit (warm light)","dark wood or bronze stem","white glass decorative midsection","carved dark base","upright","desk-sized indoor object"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
